GlobalParams.Name: MasterDrugList
GlobalParams.Expression: new[] { new { Id = 123, Start = new DateTime(2025, 1, 1), End = new DateTime(2025, 2, 1) } }

GlobalParams.Name: MasterPlanList
GlobalParams.Expression: new[] { new { Id = 456, Start = new DateTime(2025, 1, 1), End = new DateTime(2025, 12, 31) } }

Rules.Expression: input.DrugId != null && (RulesEngineUtils.IsValid(MasterDrugList, input.DrugId, input.RequestDate ?? DateTime.Now, input.RequestDate ?? DateTime.Now) || input.DrugId == 888)

Context.Expression: "Drug check failed - Drug not found in master list or outside valid date range"

Rules.Expression: input.PlanId != null && RulesEngineUtils.IsValid(MasterPlanList, input.PlanId, input.RequestDate ?? DateTime.Now, input.RequestDate ?? DateTime.Now)

Context.Expression: "Plan check failed - Plan not found in master list or outside valid date range"
"Request rejected - One or more validations failed"
